queries.question: Show me all directors and editors of shows with hour-long episodes.
queries.sql:
SELECT Crew.Name 
FROM Crew JOIN Episodes ON Crew.Episode_ID = Episodes.Episode_ID
WHERE (Crew.Position = "Director" OR Crew.Position = "Editor") AND Episodes.EpisodeLength = "01:00:00"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?crew a :Crew .
  ?episodes a :Episodes .
  ?crew p:hasEpisodes ?episodes .
  ?crew p:name ?name .
  ?crew p:Position ?position_w .
  ?crew p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?episodes p:EpisodeLength ?episodelength_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?position_w) = "Director" || STR(?position_w2) = "Editor")) && STR(?episodelength_w) = "01:00:00"))
}

SELECT Crew.Name 
FROM Crew JOIN Episodes ON Crew.Episode_ID = Episodes.Episode_ID
WHERE Crew.Position = "Director" OR Crew.Position = "Editor" AND Episodes.EpisodeLength = "01:00:00"

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?crew a :Crew .
  ?episodes a :Episodes .
  ?crew p:hasEpisodes ?episodes .
  ?crew p:name ?name .

  FILTER((STR(?position_w) = "Director" || (STR(?position_w2) = "Editor" && STR(?episodelength_w) = "01:00:00")))
}
